title: ApprovalDecision
description: Governed local record of an approval decision or administrative annotation on an action at APPROVAL_REQUESTED state. Created by GAIL OS approval_actions.py (Chunk 20B). GAIL OS canonical source.

ApprovalDecisionType.description: Classification of a local approval action.

decision_id.description: Unique approval decision identifier. Must use the 'aprv-' prefix.

action_id.description: Action this decision applies to. Must use the 'action-' prefix.

mission_id.description: Parent mission identifier. Must use the 'mission-' prefix.

decided_by.description: Human or system that made this decision.

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this decision was made.

rationale.description: Reason for this decision. Required for audit trail.

authority_basis.description: Authority under which this decision was made (e.g. 'R0 — local dry-run').

envelope_id.description: AuthorityEnvelope reference if one governed this decision. Must use the 'env-' prefix when present.

hold_until.description: ISO 8601 timestamp until which the action is held (HELD decisions only).

info_requested.description: Description of what additional information is needed (MORE_INFO_REQUESTED decisions only).

info_from.description: Who must provide the requested information (MORE_INFO_REQUESTED decisions only).
